meta.title: Framer Review | Is it worth it?
meta.description:
Framer Review | How to Use Framer to build a website

Framer 👉 https://bit.ly/45yyE9N (free trial)
Use code: "partner25proyearly" to get a discount

In this video I review Framer. This No codewebsite builder creates websites fast and easy. In this review I reveal if you should spend time in learning framer, if it is worth the investment and what framer can do for you.  If you want to learn more about framer check out my other videos.

Other Framer Videos
5 Framer AI websites https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pyV2rxCiZ7o
Framer AI review https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YnfnyEJpzO8
Framer Tutorial 

My Favorites Website builders:
10Web: https://10web.io/?_from=softwaresensei 
Mixo: https://mixo.io/?via=softwaresensei
Framer: https://bit.ly/45yyE9N

Check out this 10Web vs Durable vs Mixo Comparison
